title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: OAK GROVE CLUB HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on improving the overall health of Club Members by increasing daily physical activity, teaching good nutrition, and helping to develop healthy relationships. 1905 SE Oak Grove Boulevard Milwaukie, OR 97267 Eligibility: Ages 6-12 and must be a student in the North Clackamas School District and attending Ardenwald, Seth Lewelling, Riverside, or Oak Grove Elementary Schools. Hours: Fall Hours: Monday-Friday 2pm-5:30pm Summer Hours: Varies by service (971) 235-5233 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 235-5233 Main phone Main phone (971) 235-5233 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Monthly sliding scale membership based on income. Program fees vary; scholarships and financial assistance are available. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: North Clackamas School District Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
